title: Basic Full Justification 📄
description: Standard case with multiple lines and evenly distributed spaces ⚖️

title: Single Long Word Line 🧍
description: Handles single-word line and left-justified last line 📏

title: Complex Multi-Line Distribution 🧩
description: Multiple lines with uneven space distribution and proper alignment 📐

title: Exact Fit No Extra Spaces 🎯
description: Words exactly fit the line width with no extra spacing needed ✅

title: Single Word Only 📌
description: Single word padded with trailing spaces to match width ➡️

title: Uneven Space Distribution ⬅️
description: Extra spaces assigned to left gaps when uneven ⚖️

title: Last Line Left Justified 🧾
